title: How to build a custom vision agent
summary: Google Developer Expert John Capobianco demonstrates building a custom vision agent that captures live photos from a webcam and animates them. The system uses Gemini, Model Context Protocol, and processes natural language prompts and real-time American Sign Language conversations.
writeup: Google Developer Expert John Capobianco walks through building a custom vision agent that captures live photos from a webcam and animates them. The build relies on Gemini and the Model Context Protocol, and it handles natural language prompts along with real-time American Sign Language conversations. The demonstration ties together AI agents, multimodal input, and natural language programming into a single working system.
